attempts.hypothesis: The harness presents item_button as a one-cycle selection strobe with item_selected valid in the same cycle; the original FSM sampled item_selected one cycle later.
attempts.failure_summary: Black-box evaluator still reported 10/10 parameterized cocotb tests failed. The evaluator stdout/stderr exposed only pytest wrapper failures and no signal-level assertion text.

attempts.hypothesis: The four valid item IDs are zero-based 0..3 rather than 1..4, with prices 5, 10, 15, and 20.

attempts.hypothesis: The harness expects item_price to be visible combinationally while item_button and a valid item_selected are asserted in Idle, before the next FSM state is observed.

attempts.hypothesis: The all-case failure is caused by reset polarity; the original candidate assumed active-high rst, while the harness may drive an active-low reset.
